subcodes.first_line: O ye two handmaidens of Baha! The Ancient Beauty, the Most Great Name—may my life, my soul, and mine inmost being be offered up
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو امة البهاء جمال قدم و اسم اعظم روحی و کینونتی و ذاتی لتربته الفدا در هر
subcodes.subjects: @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort
